response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed. The character (Ichijou Ririka) speaks to the audience. The audio track consists solely of her voice and instrumental background music. No vocal singing was detected in the video, therefore no web search for lyrics was performed.
response.global_summary: A video message from virtual idol Ichijou Ririka for her 2025 birthday, featuring her speaking over background instrumental music, followed by a static message screen.

scenes.description: Ichijou Ririka speaks to the camera in a virtual carousel setting. Text "#一条莉々華生誕祭2025" appears in the top right. Background instrumental music plays.
A static image containing a written message from Ichijou Ririka to her fans.
